hint: Phase ROTATE: push tangentially on a bar-tip to spin the T toward goal angle. Phase TRANSLATE: when aligned, push through the centre of mass toward (256,256).
Each step, enumerate candidate contacts around the T + a push direction; score by reduction in pos_error + k*angle_error; execute the best (1-step greedy).
Private sim synced via compensated_reset_state; try <=8 candidate targets over <=3 step rollouts; pick lowest block-pose cost. Keep it fast.
Smooth proportional law gated on orientation: correct angle first (offset torque push), then drive position proportionally to goal. Tune gains + switch threshold.
